prompt: Create a vertical fantasy anime illustration of a dragon musician, a shirtless dark-brown-skinned male humanoid dragon in three-quarter profile facing right, holding a tall black string instrument like a shamisen or lute. His face is deliberately covered by a flat opaque brown square censor block centered over the eyes, nose, and mouth. He has long tousled ash brown hair swept back, two dark branching antler-like horns rising from his head, one pointed ear visible with a small earring, and a long golden-scaled dragon tail curling behind him on the left. Add four large jagged purple fin-like scales behind his head and neck, with a mesh scale texture, plus gold scale patches on both shoulders, collarbone, chest, and forearms. His torso is muscular and lean with defined abs, bare chest, and warm cel-shaded highlights. Dress him in a vivid draped robe around the waist and arms: orange and magenta fabric with gold floral embroidery near the lower left, loose sleeves flowing around the instrument. The instrument is vertical on the right side of the composition, with a black body and neck, gold fittings, visible frets and strings, a decorative headstock, and dark tassel-like horizontal cords near the top; one hand grips the neck while the other rests near the strings. Use elegant Japanese-inspired fantasy character art, clean ink lines, soft painterly cel shading, warm gold accents, high-detail scales and hair strands, a pale off-white background, close cropped composition from thighs to head, dramatic but calm mood, no text, no watermark.
